mapper.insert: insert into ess_device ( member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date ) values ( #{member_id}, #{group_id}, #{device_name}, #{location}, #{capacity_kw}, #{device_type}, #{status}, #{install_date} )
mapper.select: select device_id, member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date is_main from ess_device where member_id = #{param1} order by device_id desc, device_id desc
select device_id, member_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date from ess_device where device_id = #{param1}
select device_id, member_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, is_main from ess_device where member_id = #{member_id} and is_main = 'Y' limit 1
